next_steps: Perform bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for fungal, mycobacterial, and viral stains and cultures
Serum cryptococcal antigen and histoplasma antigen testing
Initiate empiric high-dose trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole and corticosteroids for suspected Pneumocystis
Urgent HIV resistance testing and coordination for antiretroviral therapy initiation once stabilized
Computed tomography (CT) of the chest with contrast to better define pulmonary micronodules
Serial monitoring of blood pressure and oxygenation in an intensive care setting
